
1.1(1): rnam dag 'dul ba'i rgyud kyi 'bum zhes 
1.2(1): bya ba bzhugs so/ /
1.3(1): /zhang zhung skad du a dkar mu ye ne raM phyod/ bod skad du/ bon nyid 
1.4(1): thugs rje gsal ba'i dbyings/ rnam dag 'dul ba'i rgyud kyi 'bum zhes bya 
1.5(1): ba/ thams cad mkhyen la phyag 'tshal lo/ /'di skad bdag gi thos pa'i dus cig 
1.6(1): na/ ston pa'i rgyal po ji snyed gsal ba/ dus gsum mkhyen pa/ nyon mongs zad 
1.7(1): pa/ shes sgrib bral ba/ dgra tshogs 'joms pa/ nyam nga med pa/ stobs chen ldan 
1.8(1): pa/ ye shes rgyas pa/ yon tan rdzogs pa/ ting 'dzin gsal ba/ mtshan nyid ldan 
1.9(1): pa/ rnam par dag pa/ lhun gyis grub pa/ thugs rje che ba/ thabs la mkhas pa/
1.10(1): ston pa 'dul ba'i rgyal po nyid/ / nyon mongs 'khor ba'i las rnams rab tu spangs 
1.11(1): nas/ yang dag rnam par dag pa'i don la rab tu 'jug par dgongs te/ bkra 
1.12(1): shis nyams dga'i gnas/ phun sum tshogs pa'i gling / yid 'ong khri smon rgyal bzhad 
1.13(1): la/ rin po che rnam dag gi stegs bu sum brtsegs la bzhugs nas/ dbu la g.yu 
1.14(1): gur sngon po 'ja' tshon sna lngas brgyan pa phub bo/ /zhabs la bdal pa bkod legs 
1.15(1): 'byung ba'i khod mnyam pa 'dings so/ /phyogs mtshams kun tu me tog dang rtsi sman 
1.16(1): sna tshogs kyi gcal bkram mo/ /brjid pa'i sku la dga' ba'i mdangs bstan nas/
1.17(1): dbu la dri med 'od dang ldan pa lnga brtsegs gsol lo/ / sku la rnam par dag pa 
2.1(1): yon tan du ma'i rgyan gyis spras so/ /phyag na rgyu 'bras bye brag ston pa'i bka' rtags 
2.2(1): bsnams nas/ sku la 'od zer grangs med par spros pas/ khams gsum gyi sems 
2.3(1): can thams cad bde bar 'khod do/ /de ltar spyi bo'i gtsug rum man chad nas/
2.4(1): zhabs kyi mthil gong yan chad du/ yon tan 'byung ba'i gnas thams cad 'od zer 
2.5(1): 'bum phrag re re 'phros pas 'dod khams dang / gzugs khams dang / gzugs 
2.6(1): med pa'i khams la sogs 'khor ba'i sems can thams cad rang rang gi sdug 
2.7(1): bsngal dang bral nas bde ba dang ldan no/ /'od zer thams cad tshur 'dus pas 
2.8(1): thugs nyid mi g.yo ba mnyam pa chen po'i dgongs pa gsal lo/ /de'i tshe de'i dus na/
2.9(1): ston pa'i 'khor du gyur pa rnam par dag pa'i mchog g.yung drung sems dpa'i 'khor/
2.10(1): thugs rje'i 'od zer dang ldan pa rnams dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /de ltar 
2.11(1): na gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po yid kyi khye'u chung dang 
2.12(1): thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rabagayung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen 
2.13(1): po gto bu 'bum sangs dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung 
2.14(1): sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po gsas bu rma lo dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /
2.15(1): gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po gsas bu g.yu lo dang 
2.16(1): thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen 
2.17(1): po me bon 'od kyi lcang lo can dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung 
2.18(1): drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po chu bon khrus kyi bum pa can dang thabs cig 
2.19(1): tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po sa bon 
2.20(1): sra brtan g.yung drung can dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung 
2.21(1): sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po rlung bon dri zhim g.yu mdangs can dang thabs 
3.1(1): cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po 
3.2(1): 'khor ba spangs pa rnams dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung 
3.3(1): sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po rka ba thub pa rnams dang thabs cig tu bzhugs 
3.4(1): so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po dri ma med pa rnams 
3.5(1): dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' 
3.6(1): chen po rnam par dag pa rnams dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen rab g.yung 
3.7(1): drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po 'khor du gyur pa btsun pa khyab pa la sogs 
3.8(1): rdul shugs stobs dang ldan pa rnams dang thabs cig tu bzhugs so/ /gshen za 
3.9(1): ne'u chung la sogs tshul khrims rmad du byung ba rnams dang thabs cig tu bzhugs 
3.10(1): so/ /gzhan yang sdig pa spangs shing dge ba la mos pa dad pa can gyi 'khor du gyur 
3.11(1): pa ni lha dang klu dang mi la sogs pa'i 'khor 'bum phrag mtha' yas pa dang thabs 
3.12(1): cig tu bzhugs so/ /de nas ston pa'i 'khor du gyur pa thams cad kyis/ mchod 
3.13(1): pa'i yo byad dpag tu med pa phul ba na dri ma med pa dag pa/ mi dge ba rang gi ma 
3.14(1): rig pa log pa'i phyogs ma 'gos pa/ ci lta bu'i yo byad dang ldan pa srid pa gsum 
3.15(1): gyis bsdus pa'i yo byad la spyod/ bla na med pa'i mchod pa snod bcud khengs pa tsam 
3.16(1): du sprin bzhin du phul lo/ /de la ston pas mchod pa'i bye brag thams cad kyang thugs 
3.17(1): rje dmigs pa med pa'i ting nge 'dzin gyis byin gyis brlabs nas/ thugs rnam par 
3.18(1): dag pa mi g.yo ba'i dgongs pa la bzhugs te/ bon nyid lhun gyis grub pa'i don 
3.19(1): yongs su rdzogs so/ /
3.20(1): 7 de'i tshe de'i dus na/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ston pa gshen rab kyis/ zhal 
3.21(1): nas dgyes pa'i 'dzum phyung nas 'khor gyi g.yung drung sems dpa' rnams la 'di 
4.1(1): skad ces bka' stsal to/ /'dus pa'i 'khor rnams thams cad gus pas rab 
4.2(1): tu nyon/ rnam dag 'dul ba'i rgyud 'bum 'di nyan cing spyod nas bsgom par 
4.3(1): bya'o/ /'di la mi nyan mi spyod mi sgom na/ 'khor rnams log par gol zhing ltung 
4.4(1): ngo / /de'i phyir na 'khor rnams 'di'i don la nyan cing bsgom par bya'o/ /'dod 
4.5(1): khams gnas rigs thams cad 'di'i don la nyan cing bsgom par bya'o/ /'di'i 
4.6(1): don la mi nyan na/ 'dod khams kyi gnas ris thams cad kyang / log par gol 
4.7(1): zhing ltung ngo / /gzugs khams kyi gnas ris thams cad kyang 'di'i don la nyan 
4.8(1): cing bsgom par bya'o/ /'di'i don la mi nyan na/ gzugs khams gnas ris thams 
4.9(1): cad kyang log par gol zhing ltung ngo / /gzugs med pa'i khams kyi gnas rigs 
4.10(1): thams cad kyang 'di'i don la nyan cing bsgom par bya'o/ /'di'i don la mi nyan 
4.11(1): na/ gzugs med pa'i khams thams cad kyang log par gol zhing ltung ngo / /de'i 
4.12(1): phyir na 'di la nyan cing rab tu goms par bya'o/ /'di la spyad cing rgyu 'bras rtogs 
4.13(1): par bya'o/ /'di la sgom zhing don la gnas par bya'o/ /ces bka' bstsal to/ /de'i 
4.14(1): dus na 'khor gyi nang nas rig pa gsal ba gzungs dang ldan pa zug rngu med pa 
4.15(1): mya ngan zad pa yon tan mnga' ba/ legs pa'i mtshan nyid dang ldan pa'i yid kyi 
4.16(1): khye'u chung zhes bya ba des/ gser gyi me tog 'dab ma stong dang ldan pa gcig /ston 
4.17(1): pa la phul zhing lha phyag lan dgu 'tshal nas/ yon tan ci snyed phun sum 'tshogs 
4.18(1): pa'i dpal/ thugs rje'i mnga' bdag 'gro ba yongs kyi skyabs/ thams cad mkhyen 
4.19(1): pa'i ston pa gshen rab lags/ rnam dag 'dul ba'i rgyud la nyan cing spyad nas 
4.20(1): sgom na ci ltar bgyid pa lags/ ces zhus sam gsol to/ /de la ston pas bka' 
4.21(1): stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung la sogs 'dus pa'i 'khor rnams nyon/ bon rnams rtsa 
5.1(1): ba thig le nyag gcig ste/ lta ba mtha' bral bon nyid gzer chen thob/ bde sdug rgyu 
5.2(1): 'bras bye brag khyad par te/ spyod pa rnam dag mi 'tshal zhib par brtsi/ nyon mongs 
5.3(1): 'khor ba'i sems can sdug cing bsngal ba la/ thugs rje bzhi dang ldan pa'i snying rje 
5.4(1): chen po bskyed/ lta spyod zung 'brel bdag gzhan do mnyam gyis/ bla med pha rol 
5.5(1): phyin pa bcu la spyod par bgyi// de ltar don dang ldan na g.yung drung sems dpa'i 
5.6(1): mchog /rang bzhin dbyer med mnyam pa chen por gnas/ ces bka' bstsal 
5.7(1): to/ /de nas yid kyi khye'u chung gis gsol pa/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ston pa gshen 
5.8(1): rab lags/ 'khor 'das bon gyi rtsa ba thig le nyag gcig la/ lta ba bon nyid mi 
5.9(1): g.yo gzer chen ci ltar gdab// dge sdig rgyu 'bras las kyi rgyu 'bras kyi/ spyod pa 
5.10(1): rnam dag mi 'chal rab tu zhib par ci ltar brtsi/ khams gsum 'khor ba'i sems 
5.11(1): can sdug cing bsngal ba la/ thugs rje bzhi dang ldan pa'i tshad med ngo bo gang la 
5.12(1): gdags/ lta spyod zung 'brel bdag gzhan do mnyam gyis/ bla med pha rol phyin pa 
5.13(1): bcu la spyad na ji ltar spyad par bgyi/ ston pa'i thugs las nges pa'i rgyud bkrol 
5.14(1): la/ bdag cag 'khor rnams kun la bstan du gsol/ ces zhus sam gsol to/ /
5.15(1): de la ston pas bka' stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung la sogs 'dus pa'i 'khor rnams 
5.16(1): thams cad kun/ rnam dag 'dul ba'i rgyud kyi bon bshad kyis/ 'di la ma yengs 
5.17(1): rab tu gus pas nyon cig /'khor ba'i bon la mtshan mar gnas pa dang / mya ngan 
5.18(1): las 'das pa'i bon mtshan ma med pa dag ni don du thig le nyag gcig spros dang 
5.19(1): bral ba'i ngang du 'dus te nam mkha'i klong du snang srid thams cad 'dus pa ltar

5.21(1): ma dngos por gdags su yod lta bu ye nas ma yin te/ rgya che phyogs ltung med pas 
6.1(1): 'di zhes mtha'i ma reg pa/ mi g.yo rtsol med rang bzhin ngang gi gzer chen thob 
6.2(1): pa'o/ /spyod pa rgyu 'bras rab tu zhib par brtsi ba ni/ mi dge sna tshogs ji snyed ma 
6.3(1): lus kun spangs nas/ dge ba'i don la rab tu brtson cing spyod pa ni/ ru sbal rgyal 
6.4(1): pos chu la dug dang rtsi 'byed ci bzhin no/ /'khor ba'i sems can rnams la thugs 
6.5(1): rje tshad med bskyed pa ni/ 'gro drug las kyis sbyong ba'i nyon mongs thams cad la/
6.6(1): tshad med snying rje chen po gzhi bzungs nas/ byams dga' btang snyoms gcig gis 
6.7(1): gcig bskyed 'byung ba ni/ nyi ma'i ngang nas 'od dang zer rnams 'byung bas mun 
6.8(1): pa dwangs pa ci bzhin no/ /lta spyod zung du 'brel nas pha rol phyin pa bcu la spyod 
6.9(1): pa ni/ dmigs med kun la snyoms par ma god sbyin pa btang ba dang / rnam dag 
6.10(1): 'chal ba med pa'i dri med tshul khrims rab tu bsrung ba dang / byung tshor rtog 'dzin 
6.11(1): med pa'i bzod pa chen po sgom pa dang / rnam g.yeng le lo med pa'i brtson 'grus 
6.12(1): myur du brtson pa dang / nyon mongs g.yo 'khrug med pa'i bsam gtan rab tu sgom 
6.13(1): pa dang / 'khrul pa'i lo shed zhom pa'i lhun grub stobs can dang / bdag phyogs 
6.14(1): nye ring med pa'i snying rje chen po bskyed pa dang / the tshom re dogs med pa'i smon 
6.15(1): lam chen po gdab pa dang / blo rtog 'khrul g.yo med pa'i thabs la rab tu mkhas 
6.16(1): pa dang / gang gis sgrib tu med pa'i shes rab chen po'i de ltar don dang ldan na/

6.18(1): bzhin mtha' ru phyin pa'o/ /mtha' ru phyin pa'i don ni bon nyid 'byams yas pa/

6.20(1): rnam par dag pa'i don ni ngo bo sems nyid do/ /sems nyid rnam par dag pa'i

7.1(1): ba ste/ sems nyid spros dang bral ba'i don la rab tu gnas par bya/ bon nyid rnam 
7.2(1): par dag pa'i don ni ye nas mtshon du med pa ste/ sems nyid mtshon du med pa'i 
7.3(1): don la rab tu 'jog par bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni ye nas dri ma 
7.4(1): med pa ste/ sems nyid dri ma med pa'i ngang la rab tu sbyang bar bya/ bon nyid rnam 
7.5(1): par dag pa btsal du med pa ste/ sems nyid btsal du med pa'i don la rab tu 
7.6(1): 'jug par bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni g.yo ba med pa ste/ sems nyid 
7.7(1): g.yo ba med pa'i don la rab tu gnas par bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don

7.9(1): bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni gdod nas dag pa ste/ sems nyid gdod 
7.10(1): nas dag pa'i don la rab tu sbyang bar bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni skye 
7.11(1): 'gag med pa ste/ sems nyid skye 'gag med pa'i don la rab tu shes par bya/ bon 
7.12(1): nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni thog mtha' med pa ste/ sems nyid thog mtha' med 
7.13(1): pa'i don la rab tu shes par bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni mtha' dbus 
7.14(1): med pa ste/ sems nyid mtha' dbus med pa'i don du shes par bya/ bon nyid rnam 
7.15(1): par dag pa'i don ni spong len med pa ste/ sems nyid spong len med pa'i don du 
7.16(1): shes par bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni rtag chad med pa ste/ sems nyid 
7.17(1): rtag chad med pa'i don du shes par bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni mtshan 
7.18(1): ma'i mtha' las 'das pa ste/ sems nyid mtshan ma med pa'i don la rab tu shes 
7.19(1): par bya/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i don ni nam mkha'i ngang nyid de/ sems nyid

29.20(1): la/ g.yung drung gi bon phye ba med pa las ma 'dres pa dgu'i bon gyi rang bzhin ci 
29.21(1): ltar 'byung bar 'gyur/ yang dag pa'i rig pa nyid kyi bon ni ye nas dag pa la/
30.1(1): yang dag pa'i rig pa nyid kyi bon gyi rang bzhin ci ltar 'byung bar 'gyur/ g.yung 
30.2(1): drung gi yan lag dgu'i bon ni ye nas dag pa la/ g.yung drung gi yan lag dgu'i

30.12(1): 'jug pa bzhi'i bon gyi rang bzhin ci ltar 'byung bar 'gyur/ bon g.yung drung

636.22(1): byas te rjes 'dzin rnams mgo rmongs su bcug pa mthong / 'di dag ni rgyal khab dang mi 
637.1(1): rigs/ chos lugs bcas gang la yang mthun sgril dang bde skyid kyi bkag rdo ru 'gyur 
637.2(1): gshis/ 'dir bon gyi gzhung lugs ngo ma shes 'dod na bon gyi gsung rab dpe cha 'di 
637.3(1): lta bu la blta klog dang zhib 'jug gnang re'i ched dang / g.yung drung bon gyi bla sprul 
637.4(1): mkhas dbang mang pos yun ring re bskul byas pa'i rkyen dang / rgya che'i bod yig klog 
637.5(1): pa po yongs la blta bde 'khyer sla'i cha rkyen du dmigs nas/ ston pa'i gsung rab lung

637.13(1): dang mjug gi zhus bsgrigs gsal bshad du bris yod/ mdor na nged las mi yongs 
637.14(1): kyis spyi lo 2011lo nas bzung mi lo lnga yi ring dad pa dag snang dang rang gi dge sbyor

637.17(1): kyang re 'ga' ma dpe gcig ma gtogs bsdur ya ma rnyed pa dang / re 'ga' bsdur ya 
637.18(1): du ma rnyed kyang bris pa'i chad lhag sogs kyis gcig mtshungs med pa dang / nged zhus 
637.19(1): sgrig pa tsho'i mkhyen dpyod tshad brgal can min pa bcas dang rjes 'gro byas pas nor 
637.20(1): 'khrul gyis bslad pa'ang yod nges pas/ rjes gzigs mkhan rnam pas su dang gang la 
637.21(1): khag dkri med pa rang bstan rang skyong gi 'gan 'khri gtsang ma phrag tu khur ste bstan pa 
637.22(1): rin po che'i ched du nor 'khrul yo bsrang dag ther gnang ba'i skul ma zhu rgyu dang 
638.1(1): mthar don du nged [<<]g.yung drung bon gyi bka' brten dpe rnying phyogs bsgrigs khang [>>]
638.2(1): gis las don rlabs chen 'di 'dra zhig legs grub byung ba ni/ rig gzhung 'di dang 
638.3(1): bstan pa 'di la lhag bsam can gyis phyar gru mnyam 'degs byas pa las byung ba 
638.4(1): yin/ kan su'u mi rigs dpe skrun khang gi dbu khrid 'brug rgyal mkhar dang gcod pa 
638.5(1): rnam gnyis nas thugs khur rgyab skyor tshad med gnang ba dang / lhag par du dus rab 
638.6(1): kyi gnyan 'phrang mang po'i nang tshe srog 'ben dang bsdos te srung skyong byas pa'i dpe cha 
638.7(1): g.yar ba'i dpe bdag rnam pa dang / de bzhin nga tsho'i bstan don gyi bya ba kun la 
638.8(1): mthun sbyor gnang ba ma tshad dpe tshogs 'di dpar skrun skabs su yang ma bskul dang 
638.9(1): blang gis zhal 'debs gnang mkhan bcas dngos shugs brgyud gsum nas rgyu tshegs 
638.10(1): thabs gsum gyis sdong grogs rogs ram gnang mkhan yongs la snying dbus nas 
638.11(1): thugs rje che zhu rgyu dang / gsung rab dag bzhengs byas pa'i dge ba'i tshogs 'dis/
638.12(1): 7 skyabs rje rgyal ba sman ri ba'i mkhan slob rnam gnyis gtsos ris su ma chad pa'i 
638.13(1): bstan 'dzin skyes chen dam pa rnams kyi sku tshe bskal brgyar brtan zhing bzhed dgongs 
638.14(1): lhun gyis 'grub pa dang / 'brel thogs kyi sbyin pa'i bdag po dang las gzhi 'di'i byed 
638.15(1): po kun tshe bsod dbang khams gong nas gong du mtho ste myur du sku gsum rdzogs pa'i 
638.16(1): sangs rgyas kyi go 'phang thob pa dang / zhang bod rig gzhung rnams mi nyams gong nas 
638.17(1): gong du 'phel te 'dzam gling tha gru yongs kyi snod bcud rgud pa gso zhing phan bde'i 
638.18(1): gsos su khyab pa dang / yangs pa'i rgyal khams kun du nad mug 'khrug rtsod dang rang 
638.19(1): byung 'byung ba'i 'jigs pa rnams rmeng med du zhi nas bde legs phun tshogs skyid kyi nyi
